_comment: Start-of-Day briefing configuration. Edit via NL Config skill.

weather._note: City name as recognized by wttr.in. Try your city name to verify.

gmail._note: Add email addresses to important_senders to prioritize them: ['boss@company.com']

calendar._note: days_ahead=1 shows today's events. Set to 2 to include tomorrow as well.

tech_news._note: Top tech items from previous night's collection to include in SOD
